## Epic 5 — Magic System (#55)

**Dependency:** #50, #51
**Est. Effort:** Extra Large

### Goal
Design and write spell chains for 2nd-3rd level equivalent spells.

### Chains to Design (extending from #54 or new)
| Chain Name | Adept (2nd-level) | Adept+ (3rd-level) | Dice Req |
|------------|-------------------|---------------------|----------|
| Fire Magic | Scorching Ray | Fireball | 2 Fire |
| Ice Magic | Snilloc's Snowball | Sleet Storm | 2 Water |
| Lightning | Lightning Bolt | Call Lightning | 2 Wind |
| Healing | Prayer of Healing | Mass Healing Word | 2 Animal |
| Protection | Mage Armor (upgraded) | Protection from Energy | 2 Protection |
| Charm | Suggestion | Hypnotic Pattern | 2 Guile |
| Illusion | Mirror Image | Major Image | 2 Wind + 1 Guile |
| Necromancy | Ray of Enfeeblement | Animate Dead | 2 Energy |
| Transmutation | Enlarge/Reduce | Fly | 2 Reason |
| Divination | See Invisibility | Clairvoyance | 2 Knowledge |

### Tasks
- [ ] Design 20-30 spells at Adept/Adept+ tier
- [ ] Write each with Weak/Standard/Strong effects
- [ ] Escalate dice prerequisites from Novice/Adept chains
- [ ] Write as formatted AsciiDoc entries
